event: carcinoma of the ampulla of Vater
small-sized multiple bilomas detected in hepatic segment VIII
preoperative chest X-ray: consolidation in right lung
chest CT: pneumonic consolidation with necrotizing change
tubogram: fistulous communication between bile duct and right lower lung
fiberoptic bronchoscopy: bile from right lower bronchus
no significant dyspnea in semi-Fowler position
